context: Tests whether the agent makes a minimal, surgical docstring edit — adding only the new timeout parameter documentation while leaving the Examples, Notes, See Also, Raises, and Returns sections completely untouched.

checklist.name: Timeout param documented
checklist.description: src/connection.py docstring Args section contains a line documenting the timeout parameter (e.g. 'timeout: Connection timeout in seconds.')

checklist.name: Examples section preserved
checklist.description: src/connection.py docstring still contains the exact Examples section with `>>> conn = connect("localhost", 8080)` and `>>> conn.send(b"ping")` unchanged

checklist.name: Notes section preserved
checklist.description: src/connection.py docstring still contains 'Connections are not thread-safe. Use one connection per thread.' unchanged

checklist.name: See Also section preserved
checklist.description: src/connection.py docstring still contains the See Also section with disconnect and reconnect entries unchanged

checklist.name: Existing args untouched
checklist.description: The 'host' and 'port' Args entries in the docstring are unchanged — no reordering or reformatting occurred

checklist.name: Unified report format
checklist.description: doc-sync-report.md contains '## Doc Sync Report' as a top-level heading
